scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v '^lib/coreui/' | tee /dev/stderr | grep 'error TS' > /dev/null && exit 1 || exit 0
scripts.validate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint:strict && pnpm test:ci
scripts.validate:full: pnpm clean && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint:strict && pnpm format:check && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build
scripts.coreui:status: cd lib/coreui && echo '── Branch ──' && git branch --show-current && echo '── Commits ──' && git log --oneline -5 && cd ../..
scripts.coreui:update: echo '⏳ Pulling CoreUI...' && cd lib/coreui && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main && cd ../.. && echo '⏳ Testing wrappers...' && pnpm test:ui && echo '✅ CoreUI update safe'
scripts.coreui:check:imports: LEAKS=$(grep -rn '@coreui' src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v 'src/components/ui/' | grep -v node_modules | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && [ "$LEAKS" -gt 0 ] && echo "❌ $LEAKS @coreui imports outside ui/" && grep -rn '@coreui' src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v 'src/components/ui/' | grep -v node_modules && exit 1 || echo '✅ No @coreui leaks'
scripts.coreui:check:react: DUPES=$(find lib/coreui -path '*/node_modules/react/package.json' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && [ "$DUPES" -gt 0 ] && echo "❌ $DUPES duplicate React" && exit 1 || echo '✅ No duplicate React'
scripts.coreui:clean:react: find lib/coreui -path '*/node_modules/react' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find lib/coreui -path '*/node_modules/react-dom' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && echo '✅ Cleaned duplicate React'
scripts.check:all: pnpm coreui:check && pnpm check:svg && pnpm check:structure && pnpm validate
scripts.check:svg: SVGS=$(grep -rn '<svg' src/ --include='*.tsx' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v 'components/ui/Icon' | grep -v 'layout.tsx' | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && [ "$SVGS" -gt 0 ] && echo "❌ $SVGS inline SVGs found" && grep -rn '<svg' src/ --include='*.tsx' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v 'components/ui/Icon' | grep -v 'layout.tsx' && exit 1 || echo '✅ No inline SVGs'
scripts.check:structure: echo '── UI wrappers:' $(ls src/components/ui/*.tsx 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && echo '── Common:' $(ls src/components/common/*.tsx 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && echo '── Features:' $(ls -d src/features/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && echo '── Stores:' $(ls src/stores/*.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && echo '── Services:' $(ls src/services/*.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && echo '── Hooks:' $(ls src/hooks/*.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
scripts.ci: pnpm clean && pnpm install && pnpm validate:full
